description_long: This sculpture depicts a winged human figure, likely an angel or a classical warrior, standing on a rounded base. The figure is dressed in a tunic with detailed armor, and one arm is raised as if pointing or gesturing forward, while the other holds a large, round shield. The wings are prominently spread behind the figure, adding a sense of grandeur and movement. The base is ornate and appears to have a plaque or inscription area at the front. The surface texture is rough and weathered, suggesting it is made from stone or concrete. The overall form is compact, with intricate details in the clothing, wings, and shield.
description: A detailed winged human figure in armor stands on an ornate base, holding a shield and gesturing forward. The sculpture has a rough, stone-like texture and intricate features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure, raised arm, shield, and detailed wings, with the base and possible plaque visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, the shield's circular shape, and the layered wings extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the broad wingspan and the back of the figure, with less detail visible on the face and front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the figure's stance, the back of the shield, and the layered structure of the wings.
attribute_subject_matter: winged human figure, possibly an angel or classical warrior
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the background is plain and isolated.
